seoTitle: Rushy Lagoon vs Sandfly — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Rushy Lagoon and Sandfly. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Rushy Lagoon vs Sandfly: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Rushy Lagoon and Sandfly.
heading: Rushy Lagoon vs Sandfly — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Rushy Lagoon, Tasmania and Sandfly, Tasmania. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Sandfly has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Rushy Lagoon (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Rushy Lagoon or Sandfly safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Rushy Lagoon has a flood risk score of 41/100, while Sandfly scores 21/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Rushy Lagoon scores 63/100 for bushfire risk. Sandfly scores 57/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Rushy Lagoon or Sandfly?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Sandfly has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.9% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
